summary: Recording quality unknown; reviewer raves about a legendary Dark Star and calls it possibly their best live show despite chaotic crowd antics.
review: The sole fan review focuses on the in‑person experience, praising the Dark Star as a career highlight and describing the concert as possibly the best they ever saw. No comments are made about the audio source or its fidelity, so the recording quality remains unclear.
